about:
Florida public school districts set their own academic calendars under state guidelines. Most large districts — including Miami-Dade, Broward, Palm Beach, Hillsborough, and Orange County — begin the school year in mid-August, earlier than most northern states. The Florida Department of Education does not mandate a universal start date, so neighboring districts may begin as much as two weeks apart.

Spring Break in Florida typically falls in March — earlier than many other states — and this creates significant travel congestion across the state. South Florida beaches and Central Florida theme parks (Walt Disney World, Universal Studios, SeaWorld) are among the busiest tourist destinations in the country during Florida Spring Break weeks. Families planning travel should book accommodations and flights well in advance.

Winter Break in Florida runs approximately two weeks from late December into early January. The Orlando area experiences some of its highest annual theme park attendance during this window. Families with local plans should expect premium pricing and capacity crowds at popular attractions.

One important planning note: Miami-Dade and Broward County have historically scheduled Spring Break one week apart. If your family spans both districts, verify each district's calendar separately. The same applies when comparing Orange County (Orlando) and Hillsborough County (Tampa) — their calendars are similar but not identical. Always check the official calendar for your specific district before booking flights or hotels.
planningTips: Florida Spring Break falls between early March and early April. South Florida beaches and Orlando theme parks are at or near maximum capacity — book accommodations and flights at least 2–3 months in advance.
Miami-Dade and Broward County have historically scheduled Spring Break one week apart. If your children attend schools in different districts, verify each district's dates before booking.

Orlando-area families: Walt Disney World and Universal Studios operate at peak capacity during Winter Break (late December to early January). Plan local outings early or consider visiting the week before the break begins.

Most Florida districts open enrollment windows in January or February for the following school year. Families relocating to Florida over the summer should contact the destination district as early as possible to secure school placement before the August start date.

faqs.q: When do Florida public schools start in 2026?
faqs.a: Most large Florida school districts — including Miami-Dade, Broward, Orange County, Palm Beach, and Hillsborough — begin the 2026–2027 school year in mid-August. Specific start dates vary by district. Select a district above to see its exact first day of school.

faqs.q: When is Spring Break in Florida for 2026–2027?
faqs.a: Spring Break in Florida typically falls in March, though the exact week varies by district. Miami-Dade and Broward County have historically scheduled Spring Break one week apart. Check each district's calendar for exact dates before booking travel.

faqs.q: Do all Florida school districts have the same calendar?
faqs.a: No. Each Florida school district sets its own academic calendar. School start dates, Spring Break weeks, and Winter Break windows can differ between neighboring districts. Always check your specific district's official calendar rather than assuming statewide uniformity.

faqs.q: Why does Florida start school earlier than northern states?
faqs.a: Florida has no statewide law tying school start dates to Labor Day, which allows districts to open in mid-August. This gives students more instructional time before required testing windows and supports longer Spring and Winter Breaks.

faqs.q: How long is Winter Break in Florida for 2026–2027?
faqs.a: Most Florida school districts observe approximately two weeks of Winter Break, typically running from the week before Christmas through the first week of January. Exact dates vary by district — check your district's official calendar for the specific break window.

faqs.q: Is Spring Break the same week for Miami-Dade and Broward County?
faqs.a: No. Miami-Dade and Broward County have historically scheduled Spring Break on different weeks, typically about one week apart. If your family has children in both districts, verify each district's dates separately before making travel plans.

faqs.q: When is the last day of school in Florida for 2026–2027?
faqs.a: Most large Florida districts end the school year in late May or early June. Select a district above to see its exact last day of school for 2026–2027.

faqs.q: Can I add a Florida school calendar to Google Calendar?
faqs.a: Yes. Each district page on Public School Calendar lets you download an ICS file with all school holidays, breaks, and key dates. Import the file into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook to see all dates directly in your personal calendar.
